overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character in dark robes walking along a dirt path through grassy hills at night. The character passes wooden fences, observes a bird flying overhead, and approaches a rocky outcrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside path with wooden fencing

events.description: bird flies overhead from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path between wooden fence posts

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through grassy terrain
simple wooden fence posts lining the right side of the path
wooden fence posts visible on the left side further ahead
rolling grassy hills with scattered rocks in the distance
clusters of purple flowers growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path bordered by wooden fences and grassy vegetation. The night sky is overcast with a blue tint. A bird flies overhead as the character proceeds toward the distant hills.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through open grassland

entered.detail: small boulders scattered among the grass on the hillside
large rocky outcrop visible on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The wooden fences fall behind as the path opens into wider grassland. The terrain becomes more open with scattered rocks visible on the hillsides. The character maintains a steady walking pace through the natural landscape.

events.description: character begins turning left toward the rocky outcrop

agents.ego_description: turning left off the main path to approach the large rocks

entered.detail: large brown boulders or rock formations on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path curves left as the character approaches a rocky outcrop. Large boulders become prominent on the left side while the grassy hills continue on the right. The character turns toward the rocks, leaving the straight path behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path that transitions from a fenced trail into an open, rocky highland under a blue-tinted night sky. It begins with the character walking between wooden fences and grassy vegetation while a bird flies overhead toward distant hills. As the character proceeds, the fences fall away and the path expands into wider grasslands dotted with scattered rocks. The scene then shifts as the trail curves left, bringing large boulders into prominence on the left side of the frame. Finally, the camera follows the character as they turn away from the straight path and move toward the rocky outcrop.
